meta.title: The CS Trip
meta.subtitle:
Like many CS students, I spent years figuring out what I actually wanted to build. I moved through cybersecurity, blockchain, and graphics programming — not always with a clear destination, but always paying attention to what resonated and what didn't.

Eventually, a pattern emerged: the problems that kept pulling me back were visual, three-dimensional, and mathematically rich. That realization brought me to where I am now — building my foundations in machine learning and computer vision, working toward a deeper focus on 3D vision.

entries.heading: Deep Learning & Computer Vision (ML & CV)
entries.content: Specializing in Deep Learning architectures and 3D Vision. Utilizing PyTorch to implement and optimize neural networks, focusing on 3D reconstruction and generative models. Currently bridging the gap between mathematical theory and high-performance implementation.

projects.name: KODAMA
projects.desc: A 3D dance pose estimation system that reconstructs human movement from video using deep learning.

entries.title: First half of year 2025
entries.heading: Computer Graphics
entries.content: Deepened expertise in the 3D graphics pipeline and real-time rendering. Explore OpenGL and Shader programming (GLSL) to understand GPU memory management, spatial transformations, and lighting models, establishing a rigorous low-level programming foundation.

projects.name: CG-Robot
projects.desc: This project is a C++ application for .

projects.name: Texture-Mapping
projects.desc: A C++ application for viewing 3D meshes and performing texture mapping and painting operations. It utilizes OpenGL for rendering and ImGui for the user interface. The application allows users to select faces on a mesh, create patches, map textures to those patches, and paint textures onto the mesh.

entries.heading: Cyber Security & Cloud
entries.content: Developed a security-first mindset by analyzing web vulnerabilities and penetration testing techniques. Focused on understanding attack vectors to build more robust, resilient systems and protect data integrity.

projects.name: AI Guardian
projects.desc: A chat-based AWS WAF creation application.

entries.title: 2022 - Early 2024
entries.heading: Cyber Security
entries.content: Developed a security-first mindset by analyzing web vulnerabilities and penetration testing techniques. Focused on understanding attack vectors to build more robust, resilient systems and protect data integrity.

entries.heading: The Beginning: Logic & OOP Foundations
entries.content: Initiated my software engineering journey with C++.
